sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: KOOL Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:KOOL
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the North Shore Equity Rotation ETF (KOOL), including its price performance, key statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and its investment strategy. KOOL aims to outperform the S&P 500 by dynamically allocating a global equity portfolio based on business cycle phases. The article also includes technical analysis, seasonal trends, and a comprehensive FAQ section addressing common investor questions about ETFs and KOOL specifically.

feed.title: Circle Internet Group, Inc. Class A Common Stock (NY: CRCL
feed.summary: This article provides recent news headlines concerning Circle Internet Group, Inc. (NYSE: CRCL), primarily focusing on its stablecoin, USDC, and its stock performance. Key news includes partnerships, market predictions for stablecoins, legislative developments around digital assets, and Circle's strong earnings reports driving stock surges. The content highlights the growing importance of stablecoins and regulatory changes impacting the crypto market.

feed.title: Genmab Discloses Orbis as 4.99% Major Shareholder
feed.summary: Genmab, a global biotech company specializing in antibody-based cancer therapies, announced that Orbis Investment Management Limited has become a major shareholder. As of March 27, 2026, Orbis holds 4.99% of Genmab's voting rights, totaling 3,205,763 shares. This move highlights continued investor interest in Genmab's innovative antibody platform and late-stage pipeline.

feed.title: SPSM ETF Holdings List — AMEX:SPSM
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed list of the holdings for the State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P 600 Small Cap ETF (SPSM), as of March 17, 2026. It includes the symbol, weight, number of shares, and market value for the top holdings such as Solstice Advanced Materials, InterDigital, and CareTrust REIT. The data offers insights into the fund's composition and its current investment allocation.

feed.title: The New Fraud Fight: How CUs Can Catch More Criminals Without Slowing Everyone Else Down
feed.summary: Credit unions are facing an increasing challenge from sophisticated digital fraud, requiring them to find ways to detect criminals without inconveniencing legitimate members. TransUnion suggests that the next phase of fraud defense will rely on passive, behavior-based tools and layered signals to improve precision and reduce false positives. This approach aims to reduce friction for members while effectively combating fraud throughout the member lifecycle.

feed.title: Guardant Health (GH) and Verana Health Announces New Partnership
feed.summary: Guardant Health (NASDAQ:GH) and Verana Health have announced a new partnership to provide biopharmaceutical researchers with access to Guardant's clinicogenomic testing data and Verana's EHR datasets. This collaboration aims to accelerate the development of new therapies and improve patient care by allowing researchers to connect molecular biomarkers with treatment decisions and clinical outcomes. Guardant Health specializes in precision oncology, using data, blood-based tests, and advanced analytics for cancer treatment.

feed.title: News Corporation (NWS) outlines US$1B buyback and ASX daily share repurchases
feed.summary: News Corporation (NWS) has detailed its stock repurchase program, authorizing up to US$1 billion in buybacks of its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. The company is providing daily Appendix 3C notifications to the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX), outlining share counts, total cash paid, and price ranges, noting that no ASX-listed CDIs are being repurchased. Management emphasizes that future repurchases are contingent on market conditions, legal factors, and alternative capital uses, categorizing related statements as forward-looking.

feed.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) Share Activity Draws Attention In S&P 500
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is drawing attention in the S&P 500 due to recent share activity. The company, a major player in global information technology focusing on cloud services, edge computing, and hybrid infrastructure, has seen a senior executive carry out a "sizable share disposal." Despite this, executives reportedly maintain a meaningful position within the company, with no accumulation activity recorded over the same period.

feed.title: Gabelli Equity Trust lowers rights offering price to $5, extends expiration to April 21
feed.summary: Gabelli Equity Trust has announced a reduction in the subscription price for its transferable rights offering from $5.25 to $5.00 per share. The expiration date for the offering has also been extended to April 21, 2026. This adjustment aims to incorporate the company's recent dividend declaration into the offering's terms.

feed.title: The Hershey Company rings the Opening Bell on Wall Street
feed.summary: The Hershey Company celebrated its "Investor Day" in New York City with company leadership ringing the opening bell for trading on the Dow. President and CEO Kirk Tanner, along with Hershey's chocolate mascots, were in attendance. This event marked a "sweet time on Wall Street" for the Dauphin County-based company.

feed.title: A tiny landlord with oil-fee income turned a Q4 profit but lost money in 2025
feed.summary: New Concept Energy, Inc. (NCE) reported a net income of $12,000 in Q4 2025, a turnaround from a net loss in the same period of 2024. Despite this, the company ended the full year 2025 with a net loss of $46,000, which is larger than the $18,000 net loss reported for 2024 (though the 2024 comparison year is incorrectly stated as 2043 in the article). NCE's revenue primarily comes from property rent and oil and gas management fees.

feed.title: Genasys (GNSS) director granted 48,498 restricted stock units as equity pay
feed.summary: Genasys Inc. director Lawrence F. Hagenbuch was granted 48,498 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of his compensation, with each RSU representing one share of common stock. These RSUs have no cash exercise price and will vest on the earlier of the company's 2027 annual shareholder meeting or a change of control. This grant increases Hagenbuch's direct holdings to 48,498 shares/share-settled units, aligning his interests with shareholder equity performance.

feed.title: Ross Stores (ROST) executive makes bona fide charitable stock gift
feed.summary: Ross Stores Group SVP and Chief Accounting Officer Jeffrey P. Burrill reported a bona fide charitable gift of 565 shares of Ross Stores common stock (ROST). The transaction involved no sale proceeds, and after the gift, Burrill directly holds 34,926 shares of common stock. This insider activity is categorized as neutral in impact and sentiment, as it was a gift rather than a market transaction.

feed.title: Huya Q2 2025 Earnings Preview
feed.summary: This article provides an earnings preview for Huya's Q2 2025 results. It is a placeholder indicating that a detailed report about the company's financial performance will be published soon.

feed.title: Frontdoor (FTDR) price target increased by 21.16% to 74.46
feed.summary: This article reports a significant increase in Frontdoor's (FTDR) price target. The target has been raised by 21.16% to $74.46.

feed.title: Fidelity Investment Grade Bond ETF
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive profile of the Fidelity Investment Grade Bond ETF (FIGB), including its pricing, dividend and valuation data, expense ratio, holdings, and performance metrics. It details the ETF's structure (active, no index tracked), expense ratio (0.36%), inception date (March 2, 2021), and assets under management ($449.2 million). The article also lists the top 15 holdings, primarily U.S. Treasury bonds and notes, and offers comparative analysis against other ETFs in its category regarding size, valuation, dividends, ESG scores, and technicals.

feed.title: ArcelorMittal Steel Plant Moves to Andhra Pradesh, Odisha Faces Industrial Losses: BJD MP
feed.summary: ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel India has relocated its proposed 12-million-tonne steel plant from Odisha to Andhra Pradesh, prompting strong criticism from the Biju Janata Dal (BJD) in Odisha. BJD MP Sasmit Patra called the move "regrettable and shameful," citing administrative failure and expressing concerns about lost industrial opportunities, local employment, and the proposed transfer of iron ore. The company cited coastal access, lower logistics costs, and better connectivity to mineral reserves as reasons for choosing Andhra Pradesh, with the issue gaining political significance after the BJP's recent electoral success in Odisha.

feed.title: Ross Stores (NASDAQ: ROST) grows sales 8% to $22.8B in 2025
feed.summary: Ross Stores, Inc. reported strong financial results for fiscal 2025, with sales increasing 8% to $22.75 billion, driven by a 5% rise in comparable store sales. The company achieved diluted EPS of $6.61 and net income of $2.15 billion, while also expanding its store count to 2,267 locations. Ross Stores returned value to shareholders through $1.05 billion in share repurchases and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.4450 per share, demonstrating solid operational performance and a commitment to shareholder returns.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro Short QQQ ETF(SQQQ) Stock Options Chain | Quotes & News
feed.summary: This document appears to be a stub or an empty page intended to display information about the ProShares UltraPro Short QQQ ETF (SQQQ) stock options chain, quotes, and news. However, it currently contains no content.

feed.title: United Rentals Inc (URI) Stock Price Up 1.3% on Mar 31
feed.summary: United Rentals Inc (URI) stock saw a 1.30% increase on March 31, reaching $723.14. Analysts forecast an average target price of $945.28 for URI, implying a 30.72% upside. GuruFocus estimates the fair value (GF Value) at $857.00, suggesting an 18.51% upside for the company.

feed.title: UBS offers autocall notes linked to First Solar (AMUB) with conditional coupons
feed.summary: UBS has priced a preliminary offering of Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to First Solar, Inc. (AMUB) with an expected maturity in April 2028. These notes offer periodic contingent coupons if the underlying stock meets observation date barriers and feature an automatic call if the stock's level equals or exceeds the initial level. Investors face principal repayment risk at maturity if the final level is below a downside threshold, and all payments are subject to UBS's credit risk.

feed.title: First Citizens BancShares, Inc. Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: First Citizens BancShares, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCNCA) will release its financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, before the U.S. financial markets open on Thursday, April 23, 2026. The company will also host a live audio webcast to discuss these results at 9 a.m. Eastern time on the same day. Investor information and the webcast link will be available on their website at ir.firstcitizens.com.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Carmen Bozic Sells Shares of Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc (VRTX)
feed.summary: Carmen Bozic, Executive Vice President and Chief Medical Officer at Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc (VRTX), sold 2,329 shares of the company on March 27, 2026. This transaction increased her total ownership to 33,076 shares. The company's insider transaction history shows more sells than buys over the past year, with shares trading at $450.95, indicating the stock is Fairly Valued according to GuruFocus's GF Value.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Kimberly Greene Sells 25,000 Shares of Southern Co (SO)
feed.summary: Kimberly Greene, Chairman, President & CEO of Georgia Power (a Southern Co subsidiary), sold 25,000 shares of Southern Co on March 30, 2026, bringing her total ownership to 103,602 shares. This transaction follows a pattern of nine insider sells and no buys for Southern Co over the past year. Despite the insider selling, Southern Co appears fairly valued according to its GuruFocus Value, trading at $96.67 against a GF Value of $91.73, while its P/E ratio is higher than the industry median.

feed.title: Duke Energy rate hike proposal sparks debate across the Carolinas
feed.summary: Duke Energy is proposing a rate hike that could increase typical residential customer bills by up to 18% over two years, sparking debate and a petition signed by over 70,000 people. The company states the increase is necessary for system maintenance, modernization, and growth, while advocacy groups like NC WARN suggest focusing more on renewable energy. The North Carolina Utilities Commission is holding public hearings, with a final decision expected this fall and potential implementation in January 2027.

feed.title: FRP Holdings, Inc. Files Form 12b-25 Notification of Late Filing
feed.summary: FRP Holdings, Inc. announced it has filed a Form 12b-25 Notification of Late Filing with the SEC for its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The delay is due to requiring additional time to finalize financial statements and for auditors to complete their work, though it is not a result of disagreements on accounting principles. The company anticipates filing within the 15-day grace period and expects decreases in net income for Q4 2025 and the full year 2025, primarily due to expenses related to the Altman Logistics platform acquisition.

feed.title: WC Smith acquires 234-unit Van Ness apartment building from AvalonBay in TOPA deal
feed.summary: WC Smith has purchased The Albemarle, a 234-unit multifamily building located at 4501 Connecticut Ave. NW, from AvalonBay for $69.7 million. The acquisition was executed as a TOPA (Tenant Opportunity to Purchase Act) deal, facilitated with the assistance of the tenants association.

feed.title: Greece returns to developed-market status in MSCI indexes in May 2027
feed.summary: MSCI announced that the MSCI Greece Indexes will be reclassified from Emerging Market to Developed Market status in one step, coinciding with the May 2027 Index Review. This decision follows a consultation with global institutional investors who largely favored the reclassification, acknowledging Greece's progress in market infrastructure convergence with Developed European standards. While feedback influenced a May 2027 implementation date instead of August 2026, the reclassification highlights Greece's sustained market reforms and its growing integration into the Developed Markets Europe investment region.

feed.title: D.R. Horton amends credit agreements to expand borrowing capacity
feed.summary: D.R. Horton has amended its primary credit agreements, increasing its borrowing capacity to $3.295 billion and extending certain terms. The homebuilder maintains a strong financial position with liquid assets exceeding short-term obligations and a moderate debt-to-equity ratio. Despite these enhancements, DHI shares have declined, with InvestingPro analysis suggesting the stock is currently undervalued.

feed.title: FRP flags lower 2025 profit as annual report slips past deadline
feed.summary: FRP Holdings (FRPH) has filed a Form 12b-25 notification for a late Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, citing delays in finalizing financial statements and completing the audit. The company anticipates filing within the 15-day grace period, but expects a significant decrease in both Q4 and full-year 2025 net income, primarily due to expenses from the Altman Logistics acquisition. This news has led to modest share price declines, reflecting investor concerns over integration costs and timing delays.

feed.title: Vistra (NYSE:VST) Shares Up 1.8% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Vistra (NYSE:VST) shares increased by 1.8% on Tuesday, trading at $150.2160 after previously closing at $147.54. Analysts generally rate Vistra as a "Buy" with an average price target of $236.87, despite the company missing its recent quarterly earnings estimates and having a high PE ratio. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.228, and institutional investors hold a significant portion of its stock.

feed.title: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) Shares Up 1.3% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) shares rose 1.3% during mid-day trading. Wall Street analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $163.77. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates, and announced a $20.0 billion share repurchase program and a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Broker-submitted Gabelli rights orders get canceled; holders must resubscribe
feed.summary: Gabelli Equity Trust (NYSE: GAB) has updated the terms of its rights offering, reducing the subscription price to $5.00 per share from $5.50 and extending the expiration date to April 21, 2026. Shareholders who submitted subscriptions through brokers will have their orders canceled and must resubscribe at the new price. Ten rights are still required to purchase one additional share.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) Shares Up 7.7% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) shares rose 7.7% in midday trading, reaching $58.85 with significant trading volume. The company's recent quarterly results exceeded analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. Despite positive analyst sentiment and growth forecasts, insiders have sold a considerable amount of shares in the past 90 days.

feed.title: Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) CEO sells 1,200 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Guidewire Software, Inc. CEO Michael George Rosenbaum reported an open-market sale of 1,200 shares of common stock on March 30, 2026, at $145.74 per share. This transaction was an automatic sale conducted under a Rule 10b5-1 Trading Plan adopted on October 14, 2025. Following the sale, Rosenbaum directly holds 218,806 shares, indicating the disposition represents a small, pre-planned portion of his total ownership in the company.

feed.title: Globe Life EVP Zorn sells $1.2m in stock after option exercise
feed.summary: Rebecca E. Zorn, EVP & Chief Talent Officer of Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL), sold over $1.2 million in company stock on March 31, 2026, after exercising options to acquire 8,800 shares. The sales were conducted in multiple transactions at prices ranging from $135.6593 to $137.4038 per share. This transaction follows recent news of Globe Life's Q4 2025 earnings, a dividend increase, expansion of its board, and new analyst coverage with a "buy" rating.

feed.title: Akari Therapeutics 10-K: $(17.3)M Net Loss, R&D Cuts and ADC Development Focus
feed.summary: Akari Therapeutics reported a net loss of $(17.3) million and operating losses of $(17.3) million, a 20% reduction from the prior year due to lower merger-related and RIF costs. The company significantly cut R&D expenses by 60% to $2.815 million, focusing on its prioritized ADC program, AKTX-101, with a Phase 1 trial targeted for Q1 2027. Akari has shifted its strategic focus to a PH1-based ADC pipeline following a merger and secured multiple financings to support its development.

feed.title: OTH: Record revenue and unit growth in 2025, with strong 2026 outlook and expanded financing
feed.summary: Off The Hook YS Inc. (OTH) achieved record revenue of $119.9M (a 21% increase) and sold 426 boats (a 32% increase) in 2025, driven by an expanded broker network, improved inventory, and technology. The company has raised its 2026 revenue guidance to $150–$155M, supported by new financing, the Apex acquisition, and strategic partnerships. This information is based on their Q4 2025 Audio Transcript from March 30, 2026.

feed.title: Murat Kalayoglu to Resign from Cartesian Board, Leaving Science & Technology Committee
feed.summary: Murat Kalayoglu is resigning from Cartesian's Board of Directors, effective March 31, 2026, to pursue other opportunities. He will also cease serving on the Science and Technology Committee and the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. Kalayoglu has been on the board since 2023.

feed.title: [8-K] GeoVax Labs, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: GeoVax Labs, Inc. announced a warrant inducement agreement with institutional investors, leading to the immediate cash exercise of existing warrants for 634,658 shares, generating approximately $863,000. In return, investors will receive new unregistered warrants to purchase an additional 1,269,316 shares, exercisable after stockholder approval and expiring in five years. The company plans to use the net proceeds for working capital and general corporate purposes and seeks stockholder approval by May 21, 2026.

feed.title: Hershey Unveils One Hershey Strategy at 2026 Investor Day
feed.summary: The Hershey Company presented its "Lead Next Generation Snacking" strategy at its 2026 Investor Day, focusing on an integrated commercial model, innovation in premium and better-for-you products, and an automated supply chain. Hershey reaffirmed its 2026 guidance, projecting 4% to 5% net sales growth and a significant increase in reported EPS, supported by the LesserEvil acquisition. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates HSY as Neutral due to strong technical momentum and cash generation, balanced against a high P/E and potential risks from cocoa costs.

feed.title: Book value per share of Gabelli Equity Trust, Inc. (The) – BOATS:GAB/R
feed.summary: This article provides the book value per share for Gabelli Equity Trust, Inc. (The), traded under the symbol GAB/R on the Blue Ocean Alternative Trade System. It serves as a financial data point for the investment trust/mutual fund, accessible through TradingView's platform. The content primarily focuses on presenting this specific financial metric.

feed.title: FUND Technical Analysis & Stock Price Forecast
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis and stock price forecast for Sprott Focus Trust Inc (FUND). It details the overall technical consensus, moving average consensus, and specific indicator readings like RSI and MACD, as well as support and resistance levels. The analysis concludes with a "Buy" overall technical sentiment despite some sell signals from individual indicators.

feed.title: New Concept Energy (NYSE: GBR) posts modest 2025 net loss on tiny revenue base
feed.summary: New Concept Energy (GBR) reported a modest net loss of $46,000, or $(0.01) per share, for 2025, operating on a small revenue base of $155,000. The company's revenue primarily stems from leasing its commercial property in West Virginia and collecting management fees from consulting on previously sold oil and gas assets. Despite the loss, New Concept Energy remains debt-free with $383,000 in cash and equivalents and a significant $3.542 million unsecured note receivable.

feed.title: Raymond James raises TD Synnex stock price target on strong earnings
feed.summary: Raymond James has increased its price target for TD Synnex (NYSE:SNX) to $200 from $175, maintaining a Strong Buy rating, following the company's strong first-quarter fiscal 2026 results. The company reported significant revenue and profitability growth, with EPS increasing nearly 70%, and its Hyve division showing robust performance. These results suggest the company is on track to achieve $20 per share in free cash flow faster than anticipated, with its stock currently appearing undervalued.

feed.title: US appeals court denies bid from families of Boeing 737 Max crash victims to reopen criminal case
feed.summary: A federal appeals court has denied a request from families of the 346 victims of two Boeing 737 Max crashes to reopen a criminal case against Boeing. The families argued that the Department of Justice failed to properly consult them before making a deal with Boeing. The court ruled that the families' rights under the Crime Victims’ Rights Act were not violated, preventing the case from being revived.

feed.title: Will Everest Group’s New Treaty Reinsurance Leader Subtly Shift Its Risk Profile And Strategy (EG)?
feed.summary: Everest Group recently appointed Jason Busti as Head of North America Treaty Reinsurance, a move that strengthens its leadership in a core treaty franchise. This appointment, alongside Jill Beggs' promotion to CEO of Reinsurance, suggests Everest's strategy to balance growing treaty and catastrophic exposure with underwriting discipline. While the appointment doesn't immediately alter the risk narrative, it underscores the company's focus on managing volatility and capital intensity in property catastrophe and treaty reinsurance.

feed.title: [Form 4] GLOBE LIFE INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Rebecca E. Zorn, EVP & Chief Talent Officer at GLOBE LIFE INC. (GL), exercised 8,800 employee stock options at $98.32 per share and subsequently sold all 8,800 acquired common shares in open-market transactions. The sales occurred at prices ranging from approximately $135.23 to $137.88 per share. Following these transactions, Zorn directly holds 17,797.0997 Globe Life common shares.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) Trading Up 3.8% - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) shares rose 3.8% to $203.43, driven by strong AI demand, planned CPU price increases, and an expanded partnership with Samsung for HBM4 memory. Despite positive catalysts like potential large AI chip orders and bullish analyst ratings, the company faces risks including significant insider selling, a slowdown in gaming revenue, and geopolitical volatility. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a price target of $290.53, though institutional positioning remains polarized.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Trading Up 3.7% - Here's Why
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) saw its shares trade up 3.7% on Tuesday, driven by strategic initiatives like the "American Dream Initiative" and Mitsubishi's adoption of its Kinexys blockchain, alongside supportive analyst commentary. Despite positive catalysts, the bank faces near-term risks including a legal dispute with Wells Fargo, investor apprehension regarding a CD&R financing deal, and reports of upcoming U.S. layoffs. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a target price of $337.83, and recently announced a quarterly dividend.
